# Fantastic-admin

> 杰出的管理系统框架

开箱即用，提供舒适开发体验

## Table of Contents

### 内建组件

#### 基础版

- [FaAlert 提示](/components/basic/FaAlert.md)
- [FaAvatar 头像](/components/basic/FaAvatar.md)
- [FaBadge 徽章](/components/basic/FaBadge.md)
- [FaButton 按钮](/components/basic/FaButton.md)
- [FaCard 卡片](/components/basic/FaCard.md)
- [FaCheckbox 复选框](/components/basic/FaCheckbox.md)
- [FaCollapsible 折叠面板](/components/basic/FaCollapsible.md)
- [FaContextMenu 右键菜单](/components/basic/FaContextMenu.md)
- [FaDescriptions 描述列表](/components/basic/FaDescriptions.md)
- [FaDivider 分割线](/components/basic/FaDivider.md)
- [FaDrawer 抽屉](/components/basic/FaDrawer.md)
- [FaDropdown 下拉菜单](/components/basic/FaDropdown.md)
- [FaFileUpload 文件上传](/components/basic/FaFileUpload.md)
- [FaFixedBar 固定栏](/components/basic/FaFixedBar.md)
- [FaForm 表单](/components/basic/FaForm.md)
- [FaHoverCard 悬浮卡片](/components/basic/FaHoverCard.md)
- [FaIcon 图标](/components/basic/FaIcon.md)
- [FaImagePreview 图片预览](/components/basic/FaImagePreview.md)
- [FaImageUpload 图片上传](/components/basic/FaImageUpload.md)
- [FaInput 输入框](/components/basic/FaInput.md)
- [FaInputOTP 验证码输入](/components/basic/FaInputOtp.md)
- [FaKbd 键盘按键](/components/basic/FaKbd.md)
- [FaLabel 标签](/components/basic/FaLabel.md)
- [FaModal 对话框](/components/basic/FaModal.md)
- [FaNumberField 数字输入框](/components/basic/FaNumberField.md)
- [FaPageHeader 页面头部](/components/basic/FaPageHeader.md)
- [FaPageMain 页面主内容区](/components/basic/FaPageMain.md)
- [FaPagination 分页](/components/basic/FaPagination.md)
- [FaPasswordStrength 密码强度](/components/basic/FaPasswordStrength.md)
- [FaPopover 弹出框](/components/basic/FaPopover.md)
- [FaProgress 进度条](/components/basic/FaProgress.md)
- [FaRadioGroup 单选组](/components/basic/FaRadioGroup.md)
- [FaScrollArea 滚动区域](/components/basic/FaScrollArea.md)
- [FaSearchBar 搜索栏](/components/basic/FaSearchBar.md)
- [FaSelect 选择器](/components/basic/FaSelect.md)
- [FaSlider 滑块](/components/basic/FaSlider.md)
- [FaSwitch 开关](/components/basic/FaSwitch.md)
- [FaTable 表格](/components/basic/FaTable.md)
- [FaTabs 标签页](/components/basic/FaTabs.md)
- [FaTag 标签](/components/basic/FaTag.md)
- [FaTextarea 文本域](/components/basic/FaTextarea.md)
- [FaToast 轻提示](/components/basic/FaToast.md)
- [FaTooltip 文字提示](/components/basic/FaTooltip.md)
- [FaTrend 趋势标识](/components/basic/FaTrend.md)

- [FaGlowyCard 发光卡片](/components/pro/FaGlowyCard.md)

- [FaIconPicker 图标选择器](/components/pro/FaIconPicker.md)
- [FaInteractiveButton 交互按钮](/components/pro/FaInteractiveButton.md)
- [FaLayoutContainer 布局容器](/components/pro/FaLayoutContainer.md)
- [FaLinkPreview 链接预览](/components/pro/FaLinkPreview.md)
- [FaLoading 加载动画](/components/pro/FaLoading.md)
- [FaMarquee 滚动横幅](/components/pro/FaMarquee.md)
- [FaMention 提及](/components/pro/FaMention.md)
- [FaMultiStepLoader 多步骤加载器](/components/pro/FaMultiStepLoader.md)
- [FaParticlesBg 粒子背景](/components/pro/FaParticlesBg.md)
- [FaPatternBg 图案背景](/components/pro/FaPatternBg.md)
- [FaQrcode 二维码](/components/pro/FaQrcode.md)
- [FaScratchOff 刮刮乐](/components/pro/FaScratchOff.md)
- [FaScrollingText 滚动文字](/components/pro/FaScrollingText.md)
- [FaSmoothSwipe 平滑滑动](/components/pro/FaSmoothSwipe.md)
- [FaSparklesText 闪耀文字](/components/pro/FaSparklesText.md)
- [FaSparkline 迷你图](/components/pro/FaSparkline.md)
- [FaSpotlightCard 聚光灯卡片](/components/pro/FaSpotlightCard.md)
- [FaSteps 步骤条](/components/pro/FaSteps.md)
- [FaStorageBox 储物箱](/components/pro/FaStorageBox.md)
- [FaTextHighlight 文字高亮](/components/pro/FaTextHighlight.md)
- [FaTextShiny 流光文字](/components/pro/FaTextShiny.md)
